concerns.text: Plan Phase 0 (R01-R04) has no explicit task coverage. R01 (verify scipy RAM), R02 (design synthetic generator), R03 (annotation protocol), R04 (power analysis) are listed in plan.md but no tasks in tasks.md map to these plan elements. Implementer cannot satisfy plan Phase 0 requirements.

T044 references FR-027 (domain bias) but only implements subsampling. FR-027 requires 'either subsample that domain or flag a violation' - the flagging alternative is not covered by any task. Missing task for FR-027 violation-flagging path.

T081, T082, T083, T099 are in plan.md Task Registry but lack explicit FR/SC tags in tasks.md. T081 (Constitution Compliance) should tag Constitution Principles I-VII. T082 (Real-World Validation) should tag FR-031b/SC-031b. T083 (Quickstart Runner) should tag FR-028/SC-028. T099 (Constitution Audit) should tag Constitution Principles I-VII. Missing traceability tags prevent coverage verification.

T042 description conflates Bonferroni correction (FR-032/SC-032) with sensitivity analysis (SC-015). Tag says 'Bonferroni-corrected α = 0.0056 per SC-015' but SC-015 is about sensitivity analysis variation <0.02, not Bonferroni. SC-015 does not exist as a Bonferroni criterion - this is a stale/incorrect tag referencing wrong SC.

T082 description uses vague language 'no domain exceeds a substantial proportion' instead of spec-defined 30% threshold from FR-027/SC-027. This is a writing issue - the task should explicitly reference the 30% threshold for traceability.

T097b appears twice with different purposes: once in Phase X (verify CI Constitution check) and once in Phase N (implement DOC003 documentation). Duplicate task IDs cause traceability ambiguity. One should be renamed (e.g., T097b-verify vs T097b-doc).

T100a-c reference 'Reference-Validator Agent' which is not defined in spec.md or plan.md. Constitution Principle II mentions Reference-Validator Agent but no task exists to implement or configure this agent. Stale tags referencing non-existent infrastructure.
